content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Roman and Numbers". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/401/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single integer n.
content.outputFormat: Print the integer n in Roman numerals.

solution.approach: Use a mapping of Roman numerals to their integer values to construct the Roman numeral representation of the input integer.
